records.question: Which companies named Petrobras have exactly 313.2 billion in assets and profits of at most 21.2 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
WHERE companies.name = 'Petrobras' AND companies.assets_billion = 313.2 AND companies.profits_billion <= 21.2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Companies.id
FROM Companies
WHERE Companies.name = 'Petrobras'
AND Companies.Assets_billion = 313.2
AND Companies.Profits_billion <= 21.2

records.question: What companies in the Banking industry with headquarters in China have the name Industrial and Commercial Bank of China, market value exactly 239.5 billion, assets at least 1723.5 billion, and sales at most 69.2 billion, located in Corporativo BBVA Bancomer in Mexico City?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
JOIN buildings ON office_locations.building_id = buildings.id
WHERE buildings.city = 'Mexico City' AND buildings.name = 'Corporativo BBVA Bancomer' AND companies.name = 'Industrial and Commercial Bank of China' AND companies.sales_billion <= 69.2 AND companies.headquarters = 'China' AND companies.market_value_billion = '239.5' AND companies.assets_billion >= 1723.5 AND companies.industry = 'Banking'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.id
FROM Companies c
JOIN Office_locations ol ON c.id = ol.company_id
JOIN buildings b ON ol.building_id = b.id
WHERE c.Industry = 'Banking'
AND c.Headquarters = 'China'
AND c.name = 'Industrial and Commercial Bank of China'
AND c.Market_Value_billion = '239.5'
AND c.Assets_billion >= 1723.5
AND c.Sales_billion <= 69.2
AND b.name = 'Corporativo BBVA Bancomer'
AND b.City = 'Mexico City'

records.question: Which companies have office locations with a move-in year of at least 2027?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
JOIN buildings ON office_locations.building_id = buildings.id
WHERE office_locations.move_in_year >= 2027

SELECT DISTINCT c.id
FROM Companies c
INNER JOIN Office_locations o ON c.id = o.company_id
WHERE o.move_in_year >= 2027

records.question: Which companies named BNP Paribas have a market value of 88 billion, assets of at least 2680.7 billion, profits of at most 10.5 billion, and are located in buildings where the status is proposed?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
JOIN buildings ON office_locations.building_id = buildings.id
WHERE buildings.status = 'proposed' AND companies.assets_billion >= 2680.7 AND companies.profits_billion <= 10.5 AND companies.market_value_billion = '88' AND companies.name = 'BNP Paribas'

WHERE c.name = 'BNP Paribas'
AND c.Market_Value_billion = '88'
AND c.Assets_billion >= 2680.7
AND c.Profits_billion <= 10.5
AND b.Status = 'proposed'

records.question: Which companies with a market value of exactly 186.5 billion have sales at most 103.3 billion and profits at most 13.3 billion, whose offices in Mexico City are in proposed buildings that are 210 meters tall, have at most 59 stories, and where the move-in year is exactly 2028?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT companies.id FROM companies
JOIN office_locations ON companies.id = office_locations.company_id
JOIN buildings ON office_locations.building_id = buildings.id
